sourceNote: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, read directly from the primary article (Peter Day, updated 2025-02-27): more than 8,000 Temporal Forces booster packs opened, per-tier rates published with 95% confidence intervals — Double Rare 16.83% ±0.79, Ultra Rare 6.67% ±0.53, ACE SPEC 5.00% ±0.46, Illustration Rare 7.72% ±0.56, Special Illustration Rare 1.17% ±0.23, Hyper Rare 0.72% ±0.18. The study validates our uniform-within-tier assumption: every individual card's measured rate fit within the 95% CI for its rarity. Temporal Forces reintroduced the ACE SPEC rarity, which replaces the first Reverse Holo slot rather than a Secret Rare slot, so it adds a hit without lowering the other odds. TCGplayer notes the pull rates are effectively identical to Twilight Masquerade and Stellar Crown by design; the small differences are within the confidence intervals.
